steps: Contact Deutsche Bank Custody to request refund of EUR 3,093.75 overpayment on DBK dividend (account 801234567)
Submit formal claim citing DE-NO tax treaty rate of 26.375% vs. applied 25% withholding
Provide documentation showing Norwegian tax residency status and treaty entitlement
If custodian cannot process, file direct refund claim with German BZSt using electronic procedure

references.title: BZSt – Withholding Tax Relief (exemption & refund procedures)
BZSt – Capital Yield Tax Relief / Refund Procedures
